description_long: This community center is a single-story building with a sprawling, L-shaped footprint, set on a rectangular green lot. The exterior features light blue siding with white trim around numerous rectangular windows, and a combination of gabled and hipped dark gray roofs. A prominent wraparound porch with white railings and wooden steps provides access to the main entrance, which is slightly elevated above ground level. The structure includes two main wings connected by a central section, with the porch extending along the front and side, offering outdoor gathering space. The building sits on a raised foundation, and the overall design is functional and welcoming, suitable for neighborhood gatherings and events. The architectural style is reminiscent of contemporary American suburban community centers, with clean lines and practical features.
description: A light blue, single-story community center with a wraparound porch, white trim, and dark gray gabled roofs, set on a green lot. The building features multiple windows and a prominent, accessible entrance with steps.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long wing of the building, the wraparound porch, and the main steps leading up to the entrance.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the narrow side of the building, the porch curving around the corner, and the green lot extending behind.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main entrance, central porch area, and both wings of the building with visible steps and railings.
description_view_3: Opposite end view showing the rear and side of the building, porch extension, and the raised foundation.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is located at the front center of the building, accessed via a set of wide wooden steps leading up to a wraparound porch with white railings. The entrance appears to be a standard-sized door, integrated into the porch area, with no visible automatic doors or ramps. The design is functional and blends seamlessly with the overall structure.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary American suburban style, characterized by a combination of gabled and hipped roofs, light blue siding with white trim, a wraparound porch, and practical, clean lines.
